zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Bennett於大約1664年出生時，他的父親John Bennett41歲，母親Mary Crawley37歲。他於1685年5月20日與Frances Burr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1739年5月30日之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Bennett于大约1664年出生时，他的父亲John Bennett41岁，母亲Mary Crawley37岁。他于1685年5月20日与Frances Burr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1739年5月30日之前。

nameMeanings.name: Bennett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the medieval personal name Benedict , from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. In the 12th century the Latin form of the name is found in England alongside versions derived from the Old French form Beneit, Benoit, which was common among the Normans. The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Bernhard  .
Altered form of French Benet or Bennet or of some other similar (like-sounding) French surname. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

variants.name: Bennetts
meanings: English (Cornwall): variant of Bennett , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Dittus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Fritz, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.
German: from a vernacular short form of the Latin personal name Benedictus (see Bennett ).

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bennight
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Bennett  .

variants.name: Bennison
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Bene(i)t + -son. See Bennett and compare Benson .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Bennett was born about 1664, his father, John Bennett, was 41 and his mother, Mary Crawley, was 37. He married Frances Burr on 20 May 1685, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died before 30 May 1739.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Bennettが約1664年に生まれた時，父John Bennettは41歳，母Mary Crawleyは37歳であった。1685年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチでFrances Burrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1739年5月30日以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Bennett(이)가 대략 1664년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Bennett(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Crawley(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1685년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 Frances Burr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1739년 5월 30일 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Bennett nasceu aproximadamente 1664, seu pai, John Bennett, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Crawley, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Frances Burr em 20 de maio de 1685, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 30 de maio de 1739.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Bennett родился около 1664 г., его отцу по имени John Bennett было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Crawley, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Burr 20 мая 1685 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер перед 30 май 1739 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Bennett nació aproximadamente 1664, su papá, John Bennett, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary Crawley, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Frances Burr el 20 de mayo de 1685, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 30 de mayo de 1739.
